answer_text:
crossbar network: non-blocking network, n個cpu都有到n個memory的路徑, O(n^2) crosspoints.
Omega network: blocking network, n個cpu藉由數個stage到n個memory的路徑,但不是每個cpu都可以到所有的memory, O(nlogn/2) crosspoints.
reason: Crossbar O(n²) 漸進正確 ✓, Omega O(n log n /2) 正確 ✓
